---
title: Overview
description: Complete multi-screen apps composed from the real components. Each template gets its own page so its D-pad focus and inputs stay isolated. Drive them with your keyboard, or scan the QR to run them on your glasses.
---

Single components show the pieces. Templates show the rhythm: how Navigator,
focus memory, the back gesture, and one-task-per-view compose into a real app.
Each template lives on its own page (so its focus engine and inputs do not fight
a neighbor), and each ships a QR that installs it as a standalone app on real
glasses.

- [Workout](/docs/templates/workout) — Navigator + a self-ticking Timer + a
  destructive Confirm to end the session.
- [Messages](/docs/templates/messages) — a message thread with ComposeFlow quick
  replies.

Want this shape as a starting point? `npm create glasskit my-app` scaffolds the
shell, then vendor what you see here:

```sh
npx @glasskit-ui/cli add navigator list timer confirm compose-flow chat-bubble
```
